results.question: How many orders do we have in total?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM orders o LIMIT 100;

results.question: List all product categories
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.category_name FROM categories c LIMIT 100;

results.question: How many customers are from the UK?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS uk_customers_count FROM customers c WHERE c.country = 'UK';

results.question: How many products do we sell?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(p.product_id) AS total_products FROM products p LIMIT 100;

results.question: How many orders were placed in 2024?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM orders o WHERE strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2024' LIMIT 100;

results.question: How many orders have status Shipped?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(o.order_id) AS shipped_orders_count FROM orders o WHERE o.status = 'Shipped' LIMIT 100;

results.question: List all suppliers
results.sql: SELECT s.supplier_id, s.company_name, s.contact_name, s.country, s.city, s.phone FROM suppliers s LIMIT 100

results.question: How many discontinued products are there?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS discontinued_product_count FROM products p WHERE p.discontinued = 1;

results.question: Who are the top 5 customers by total revenue?
results.sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.company_name, SUM(orv.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM customers c JOIN order_revenue orv ON c.customer_id = orv.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.company_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

results.question: What is the total revenue by product category?
results.sql: SELECT c.category_name, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity * (1 - oi.discount)) AS total_revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name LIMIT 100;

results.question: What are the top 5 best selling products by revenue?
results.sql: SELECT pss.product_name, pss.total_revenue FROM product_sales_summary pss ORDER BY pss.total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

results.question: How many orders were placed each month in 2024?
results.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS order_month, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM orders o WHERE strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY order_month ORDER BY order_month LIMIT 100;

results.question: What is the average order value overall?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(revenue) AS average_order_value FROM order_revenue;

results.question: Which product category has the most products?
results.sql: SELECT c.category_name, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 1;

results.question: How many orders does each customer have?
results.sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.company_name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.company_name LIMIT 100;

results.question: What percentage of orders were cancelled?
results.sql: SELECT (COUNT(o.order_id) FILTER (WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled') * 100.0 / COUNT(o.order_id)) AS cancelled_percentage FROM orders o;

results.question: Which customers have not placed any orders?
results.sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.company_name FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.order_id IS NULL LIMIT 100;

results.question: What is the month with the highest total revenue in 2024?
results.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(o.revenue) AS total_revenue FROM order_revenue o WHERE strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2024' GROUP BY month ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1;

results.question: Which products have never been ordered?
results.sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_name FROM products p LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.product_id IS NULL LIMIT 100

results.question: What is the revenue contribution percentage of each category?
results.sql: SELECT c.category_name, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity * (1 - oi.discount)) AS category_revenue, (SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity * (1 - oi.discount)) / (SELECT SUM(oi2.unit_price * oi2.quantity * (1 - oi2.discount)) FROM order_items oi2)) * 100 AS revenue_percentage FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id GROUP BY c.category_name LIMIT 100;

results.question: Which customers placed orders in both 2023 and 2024?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id, c.company_name FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE strftime('%Y', o.order_date) = '2023' AND c.customer_id IN (SELECT o2.customer_id FROM orders o2 WHERE strftime('%Y', o2.order_date) = '2024') LIMIT 100;

results.question: What is the average number of items per order?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(item_count) AS average_items_per_order FROM (SELECT o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity) AS item_count FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id) subquery;
